assetName.title: assetName
assetName.description: The name of the asset with the threshold breach.

thresholdName.title: thresholdName
thresholdName.description: The name of the threshold that was breached.

accountName.title: accountName
accountName.description: The name of the account associated with the asset.

accountId.title: accountId
accountId.description: The Salesforce ID of the account.

customerName.title: customerName
customerName.description: The name of the customer associated with the asset.

customerPhone.title: customerPhone
customerPhone.description: The phone number of the customer.

contactId.title: contactId
contactId.description: The Salesforce ID of the contact record.

vehicleName.title: vehicleName
vehicleName.description: The name of the vehicle the device is assigned to.

serialNumber.title: serialNumber
serialNumber.description: The serial number of the device.

success.title: success
success.description: Indicates whether the threshold breach details were retrieved successfully.

message.title: message
message.description: A status or error message about the retrieval operation.
